name: @borjie/conformal-calibration-online
description: Adaptive Conformal Inference (ACI) — online α-update for prediction intervals. Pure state machine wrapping the conformal threshold-quantile kernel; adapts the rejection rate to observed coverage as new data arrives. Integrates with packages/forecasting-engine. Reference: Gibbs and Candes 2021 + arXiv 2507.02496. (PO-12)
